speaker: KING
text: There’s matter in these sighs; these profound heaves

speaker: KING
text: You must translate; ’tis fit we understand them.

speaker: KING
text: Where is your son?

speaker: QUEEN
text: Bestow this place on us a little while.

speaker: QUEEN
text: Ah, mine own lord, what have I seen tonight!

speaker: KING
text: What, Gertrude? How does Hamlet?

speaker: QUEEN
text: Mad as the sea and wind when both contend

speaker: QUEEN
text: Which is the mightier. In his lawless fit,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Behind the arras hearing something stir,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Whips out his rapier, cries “A rat, a rat,”

speaker: QUEEN
text: And in this brainish apprehension kills

speaker: QUEEN
text: The unseen good old man.

speaker: KING
text: O heavy deed!

speaker: KING
text: It had been so with us, had we been there.

speaker: KING
text: His liberty is full of threats to all—

speaker: KING
text: To you yourself, to us, to everyone.

speaker: KING
text: Alas, how shall this bloody deed be answered?

speaker: KING
text: It will be laid to us, whose providence

speaker: KING
text: Should have kept short, restrained, and out of haunt

speaker: KING
text: This mad young man. But so much was our love,

speaker: KING
text: We would not understand what was most fit,

speaker: KING
text: But, like the owner of a foul disease,

speaker: KING
text: To keep it from divulging, let it feed

speaker: KING
text: Even on the pith of life. Where is he gone?

speaker: QUEEN
text: To draw apart the body he hath killed,

speaker: QUEEN
text: O’er whom his very madness, like some ore

speaker: QUEEN
text: Among a mineral of metals base,

speaker: QUEEN
text: Shows itself pure: he weeps for what is done.

speaker: KING
text: O Gertrude, come away!

speaker: KING
text: The sun no sooner shall the mountains touch

speaker: KING
text: But we will ship him hence; and this vile deed

speaker: KING
text: We must with all our majesty and skill

speaker: KING
text: Both countenance and excuse.—Ho, Guildenstern!

speaker: KING
text: Friends both, go join you with some further aid.

speaker: KING
text: Hamlet in madness hath Polonius slain,

speaker: KING
text: And from his mother’s closet hath he dragged him.

speaker: KING
text: Go seek him out, speak fair, and bring the body

speaker: KING
text: Into the chapel. I pray you, haste in this.

speaker: KING
text: Come, Gertrude, we’ll call up our wisest friends

speaker: KING
text: And let them know both what we mean to do

speaker: KING
text: And what’s untimely done.

speaker: KING
text: Whose whisper o’er the world’s diameter,

speaker: KING
text: As level as the cannon to his blank

speaker: KING
text: Transports his poisoned shot, may miss our name

speaker: KING
text: And hit the woundless air. O, come away!

speaker: KING
text: My soul is full of discord and dismay.
